createtreasury.debit_card.blank_hint: Insert this card in a linked Card Press first!
createtreasury.ponder.minting_press.head: Minting Press
createtreasury.ponder.minting_press.text: Connect any source of Rotational Force to the shaft
Place a Depot directly below the press head
Zinc Ingots are stamped into Zinc Coins (×4)
Brass Sheets are stamped into Brass Coins (×2)
Andesite Alloy is stamped into Andesite Coins (×4)
createtreasury.ponder.company_terminal.t: The Company Terminal lets players create and manage Companies and Banks
Right-click to open the terminal screen
From the screen you can found a new Company or Bank, invite other players, or accept invitations
Banks can be linked to Minting Presses using a Company Linker, allowing coins to be stamped with the bank's name
createtreasury.ponder.minting_press_link: The Company Linker lets you link a Minting Press to a Bank
Right-click with the Linker to open the Bank selection screen and choose your Bank
Then Sneak + Right-click the Minting Press to link it to the selected Bank
The press is now linked! Coins it mints will be stamped with the Bank's name
Hover over the coins to see "Minted by: TreasuryBank" in the tooltip
